name: anki-mcp-server
description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that enables LLMs to interact with Anki flashcard software through AnkiConnect

tools.name: anki_list_tags
tools.description: List all tags currently used in Anki

tools.name: anki_add_note_tags
tools.description: Add tags to one or more notes

tools.name: anki_remove_note_tags
tools.description: Remove tags from one or more notes

tools.name: anki_search_notes
tools.description: Search for notes using Anki query syntax

tools.name: anki_get_note_info
tools.description: Get detailed information about a note

tools.name: anki_update_note
tools.description: Update an existing note's fields and/or tags

tools.name: anki_get_note_type_info
tools.description: Get detailed structure of a note type
